assertions.title: browser_only applies agentic defaults when tuning fields are omitted

steps.action: POST /webhook with browser_only preset and no ultraPlanTuning

steps.observed: Terminal status received - grounded_web source executed with multi-query (multiple queries in querySummary)

steps.action: Verify resolved ultraPlanTuning values in status
steps.observed: ultraPlanTuning not exposed in status response - cannot verify resolved values

assertions.issues: BLOCKED: The run status response does not expose ultraPlanTuning or groundedSearchTuning resolved values. Cannot verify that browser_only uplift defaults were applied. Evidence of browser_only behavior exists (grounded_web ran with multi-query), but explicit resolved-config evidence for tuning fields is not available in the API response.

assertions.title: explicit browser_only tuning overrides are preserved

steps.action: POST /webhook with explicit ultraPlanTuning: multiQuery=false, retryBroadening=false, parallelCompanyProcessing=true
POST /webhook with partial override: only retryBroadening=false
steps.expected: 202 accepted, omitted fields should resolve to browser_only defaults

steps.action: Verify resolved tuning values in status
steps.expected: Explicit values preserved exactly, omitted fields show browser_only defaults
steps.observed: ultraPlanTuning not exposed in status response - cannot verify explicit values were preserved

assertions.issues: BLOCKED: Cannot verify explicit tuning overrides were preserved because the run status does not expose ultraPlanTuning resolved values. Both requests were accepted (202), but there's no way to confirm the explicit values were actually applied vs. being coerced/clobbered.

assertions.title: multi-query, retry, and parallel flags are independently togglable

steps.action: POST baseline browser_only with all flags enabled (omitted)
Verify flag values in status for each variant
steps.expected: Each variant shows only its disabled flag as false
steps.observed: ultraPlanTuning not exposed in status - cannot verify isolated flag effects

assertions.issues: BLOCKED: All requests were accepted but cannot verify that flag toggles actually affected behavior. The API does not expose ultraPlanTuning in run status, so there's no way to confirm the flags were independently set. Additionally, need behavior evidence (not just config) showing isolated flag effects - e.g., query count difference between multiQuery on/off variants.

assertions.title: malformed control-plane payloads fail closed with explicit validation errors

steps.expected: 400 with explicit error, no runId created
steps.observed: 202 accepted with runId run_8a2876df37094641b6874630496b13c2 - SHOULD BE 400

steps.expected: 400 with explicit error, no runId created
400 with explicit error, no runId created
steps.observed: 202 accepted with runId run_70880d51ea84470cbab39bc16aecadad - SHOULD BE 400

steps.action: POST with wrong event value (sanity check)
steps.observed: 400 with message 'event must be command-center.discovery' - CORRECT

evidence.networkEvidence: HTTP 202 returned for malformed payloads instead of 400

assertions.issues: FAIL: The API is accepting malformed control-plane payloads when it should return 400 errors. Non-boolean multiQueryEnabled values (string 'not-a-boolean' and number 123) and unknown flag keys are being silently accepted with 202 and runIds created. The validation logic exists in parseWebhookRequest() but is NOT being enforced for ultraPlanTuning fields. This is a security/correctness issue - malformed configuration can be injected.

assertions.title: browser_only uplift defaults do not leak into other presets

steps.action: POST ats_only with omitted tuning fields
steps.observed: 202 accepted run_57f59e139ab043fab3b571decf08326f - grounded_web excluded with message 'Source grounded_web was excluded by preset ats_only'

steps.action: POST browser_plus_ats with omitted tuning fields
steps.expected: all sources run, legacy defaults used (NOT browser_only uplift)
steps.observed: 202 accepted run_7b68346276004c89a4bbb6d9a626a050 - all sources ran including grounded_web

steps.expected: ats_only/browser_plus_ats use legacy values: maxResultsPerCompany=6, maxPagesPerCompany=4, etc.
steps.observed: groundedSearchTuning not exposed in status - cannot verify legacy values were used vs. browser_only uplift

assertions.issues: BLOCKED: Cannot verify that groundedSearchTuning uses legacy values for non-browser_only presets. The routing behavior is correct (ats_only excludes grounded_web, browser_plus_ats runs all), but there's no way to verify the actual tuning values (maxResultsPerCompany, maxPagesPerCompany, maxRuntimeMs, maxTokensPerQuery) were NOT the browser_only uplift values. Need resolved config evidence showing these values.

frictions.description: Run status response does not expose ultraPlanTuning or groundedSearchTuning resolved values
frictions.resolution: Would need API change to include resolved tuning config in status response, or alternative verification method (worker logs with structured config_resolved events)

frictions.description: Non-boolean and unknown ultraPlanTuning fields are being silently accepted instead of returning 400
frictions.resolution: Bug in validation - the code exists but appears not to be enforced at runtime

blockers.description: API does not expose resolved tuning configuration (ultraPlanTuning, groundedSearchTuning) in /runs/{runId} status response. Cannot verify VAL-API-001, VAL-API-002, VAL-API-003, VAL-API-005 without this evidence.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: VAL-API-001/002/003/005 blocked (cannot verify resolved-config evidence - API doesn't expose tuning values in status), VAL-API-004 failed (malformed payloads accepted with 202 instead of 400). The validation logic for malformed ultraPlanTuning fields exists in the codebase but is not being enforced at runtime - non-boolean values and unknown keys are silently accepted. Routing behavior (browser_only runs grounded_web, ats_only excludes it) is correct, but tuning value verification requires API changes or alternative evidence sources.
